title: Siemens U273 B6 parametric AC sensitivity
status: scientific sensitivity study, not final full-device curve
warning: C1=1000 pF is fixed. C4/C6, B11 output impedance Zcmd(s), R7/R8 settings, diode calibration, and downstream load remain parameters.

scenarios.name: cmd_ideal_c4c6_0
scenarios.note: Old local test limit: command node held at AC ground, C4/C6 omitted.

scenarios.name: cmd_10k_c4c6_0
scenarios.note: Finite B11 output impedance sensitivity, C4/C6 omitted.

scenarios.name: cmd_100k_c4c6_0
scenarios.note: Finite B11 output impedance sensitivity, C4/C6 omitted.

scenarios.name: cmd_1M_c4c6_0
scenarios.note: Finite B11 output impedance sensitivity, C4/C6 omitted.

scenarios.name: cmd_open_c4c6_0
scenarios.note: Upper sensitivity bound: command port left open in AC.

scenarios.name: cmd_100k_c4c6_100p
scenarios.note: Adjustment-capacitor sensitivity with symmetrical 100 pF C4/C6.

scenarios.name: cmd_100k_c4c6_1n
scenarios.note: Adjustment-capacitor sensitivity with symmetrical 1 nF C4/C6.
